1.21.1.0.0.1:
-removed a structure
-disabled random event system outside the overworld
-fixed game crash when Calculation tries to kill you
-fixed the bed scare message not being properly localized
-added a config option for disabling the screen effect
-added a config option enabling vanilla music
1.21.1.0.0.2:
-looping sound effects now use the vanilla tickable sound system, making them smoother and less buggy (also fixes the bug where the static sound would sometimes last longer than the visual effect)
-replaced the dialogue for the "mystery_person" event
1.21.1.0.1.0:
-reworked Calculation
-added 5 new (physical) entities
-added a new random event
-the Tossed Around event now disables fall damage
-the Drop From Sky event is now disabled when the player is under sea level
-added "ultra_scary mode", a new config option that undoes certain balance changes
-changed the way player fall damage is disabled to a system that should hopefully be more reliable
-the minimum time for the Visage to spawn has been lowered from 23 minutes to 5 minutes
-add a new screen that warns players to disable hud_batching if ImmediatelyFast is installed
-fixed a crash with the Inventory Bug in multiplayer
-removed the multiplayer warning message
-started implementing a new script system. This new system allows events to persist across world reloads, supports more complicated player interactions, and allows scripts to be synced to the client. Old events will gradually be migrated to this new system
-fixed issue where static (and possibly some other things idr) would continue ticking when the game was paused
-lowered the volume of the static sound effect
-updated random events to use the standard neoforge registration system
-adjusted the default values for the event interval configs
-adjusted the weights of the random event rarity categories
-the event interval configs now have a hardcoded lower limit of 600 ticks (30 seconds)
-added new random structures
-removed the "Under Construction" sign - it might come back later
-added the "Quick Startup" config option, which makes Phantom OS loading times faster
-fixed some config localization entries using the working title of the mod
-various changes to the relog events:
    -there is now a cooldown between the event checks, meaning you can't force them by repeatedly relogging
    -added new sign messages
    -fixed signs facing slightly off-center
-added a new interaction with c0rrup1e3_en1i1y
-added new answers for Friend
-added a new chat entity
-the Visage's pause screen interaction now pauses while the Minecraft window isn't focused
-updated the Visage's death text
-added new interactions during the c0rrup1e3_en1i1y box sequence
-gave all super_scary.jar entities localization entries
-item tooltips are now properly localized
-changed what happens when you are killed by the Visage
-the mod now replaces the sun and moon textures with the round versions from beta 1.9
1.21.1.0.1.2:
-added the Extra Debug Info config option (currently just displays entity pathfinding)
-updated the Deadeye's AI to be far more advanced
-removed some redundant parts of the Watchtower's AI
-decreased the rate at which the Watchtower harms the player
-fixed missing punctuation in some of the mod's config descriptions
1.21.1.0.1.3:
-the bed scare now only happens if vanilla sleeping conditions are met
-added a new disclaimer screen that warns about the mod being in alpha and breaking with shaders
-the mod homepage and icon are now visible on the neoforge mod info screen
-implemented an update checker
-rewrote the way the console screen is handled internally, making it much easier to work with
-ultra_scary mode is no longer a config option. It is now activated with a secret message in the console screen
-ultra_scary mode now changes the menu screen
-migrated the Party and Dark World events to the new script system
-added new phrases to NaN's trigger list
